code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Seiceáil an bhfuil an teaghrán URL sprice a sholáthraítear laistigh den fhearann a sholáthraítear.
Má tá, cuir an URL sprice ar ais le haghaidh atreoraithe; mura bhfuil, téigh siar ar an URL fearainn le haghaidh atreoraithe.
Úsáid prótacal https.

Samplaí:

getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An teaghrán URL sprice.
@param domain: An teaghrán fearainn, gan phrótacal.

@return An teaghrán URL le haghaidh atreoraithe.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Cuireann storeInfoInHeader an fhaisnéis sholáthartha i léarscáil cheanntásc freagartha HTTP atá ann cheana faoin gcineál sonraithe.
Breathnaíonn an fheidhm seo ar na cineálacha faisnéise seo a leanas: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Stóráiltear iad mar na heochracha 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', agus 'Cache-Control', faoi seach.
Léitear ábhar na faisnéise ó iarratais úsáideora.
Má tá an cineál faisnéise sonraithe bailí, ní mór don cheanntásc freagartha nuashonraithe é a bheith aige. Má théann aon rud mícheart, ba cheart don fheidhm an léarscáil cheanntásc bhunaidh a thabhairt ar ais gan aon athruithe.

Args:

infoType (string): An cineál faisnéise le stóráil sa cheanntásc.
infoContent (string): Ábhar na faisnéise le stóráil sa cheanntásc.
header (map[string]string): An léarscáil cheanntásc freagartha atá ann cheana.

Returns:

map[string]string: An léarscáil cheanntásc freagartha nuashonraithe leis an bhfaisnéis stóráilte.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
fw_segments_by_variant:
Criptigh an sonra leis an eochair ag baint úsáide as modh CBC.
Tá na bearta eochracha a sholáthraítear fada go leor (>= 64 beart) don dá algartam AES agus DES.
Roghnaigh ach algartam amháin le cur i bhfeidhm agus úsáid an réimír de na bearta eochracha a sholáthraítear a mheaitseálann leis an bhfad riachtanach.
NÁ roghnaigh an t-algartam bunaithe ar fhad na heochrach.
Tabhair ar ais an sonra criptithe, an IV (veicteoir túsaithe), agus an eochair a úsáideadh le haghaidh criptithe.
Argóintí:
- key: Na bearta chun an eochair criptithe a ghiniúint.
- data: An sonra le criptiú.
Toradh:
- An sonra criptithe, an IV, agus an eochair a úsáideadh le haghaidh criptithe. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Criptigh na sonraí leis an eochair ag baint úsáide as modh CBC.
Tá na bearta eochracha a sholáthraítear fada go leor (>= 64 beart) don dá algartam AES agus DES.
Roghnaigh algartam amháin le cur i bhfeidhm agus úsáid an réimír de na bearta eochracha a sholáthraítear a mheaitseálann an fad riachtanach.

- Na sonraí criptithe, an IV, agus an eochair a úsáideadh le haghaidh criptiú. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Criptigh an sonra leis an eochair ag baint úsáide as AES agus mód CBC.
Tá na bearta eochrach a sholáthraítear fada go leor (>= 64 beart). Úsáid an réamhréimse den eochair sholáthraithe a mheaitseálann an fad riachtanach.
Tabhair ar ais an sonra criptithe, an IV (veicteoir tosaithe), agus an eochair a úsáideadh le haghaidh criptithe.

Argóintí:
- key: Na bearta chun an eochair criptithe a ghiniúint (ar a laghad 16 beart).
- data: An sonra le criptiú.

Toradh:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): An sonra criptithe, an IV, agus an eochair a úsáideadh le haghaidh criptithe.

Tabhair ar ais na sonraí criptithe, an IV (veicteoir túsúcháin), agus an eochair a úsáideadh le haghaidh criptithe.

prompt_en:
/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
code:

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Parsáil na sonraí XML agus cuir eolas an mhic léinn ar ais don ainm úsáideora agus don phasfhocal a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag na sonraí XML:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Úsáid na leabharlanna seo:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

Is féidir linn ceist XPath a thógáil agus ansin an cheist a fhorghníomhú chun cuardach a dhéanamh ar eolas an mhic léinn.

@param xmlData Na sonraí XML ina bhfuil eolas an mhic léinn.
@param username Ainm úsáideora an mhic léinn lena chuardach.
@param password Pasfhocal an mhic léinn lena chuardach.

@return Tupla (name, age, citizenship) má aimsítear an mac léinn. Seachas sin, cuireann sé teaghráin fholamh ar ais.

Parsáil an tsonraí XML agus cuir eolas an mhic léinn ar ais don ainm úsáideora agus don phasfhocal a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an sonraí XML:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"
